resolution_notes: DEF level sensor was reading incorrectly despite adequate fluid. Replaced sensor, cleared codes. Derate resolved immediately.
DPF soot load at 94%. Performed stationary forced regen using INSITE. DPF differential pressure sensor was dirty, cleaned and recalibrated. Regen completed successfully.
Fuel pressure low at 11 kPa. Both filters badly clogged due to contaminated fuel. Replaced both filters, bled fuel system, pressure restored to 27 kPa. Codes cleared.
EGR valve stuck partially closed due to heavy carbon buildup. Attempted cleaning first — valve still not responding to commands. Replaced valve assembly. Derate cleared after replacement.

resolution_type: Oil Top-Up + Oil Pressure Sensor Replaced
resolution_notes: Engine oil was 3 quarts low. Topped up oil, cleared codes, sensor also replaced as precaution due to erratic readings. Oil pressure restored to normal 42 psi. Shutdown protection had triggered correctly.

resolution_type: DEF Tank Drained and Refilled with Correct Fluid
resolution_notes: DEF quality fault. Operator had inadvertently added water to DEF tank. Drained full tank, flushed system, refilled with correct ISO 22241 DEF. SCR inducement cleared after 20 min drive cycle.

Boost pressure consistently low (8-12 psi, target 24+). VGT actuator not responding to ECM commands. Replaced actuator, boost restored to 25 psi. Fault count was high (11 occurrences) indicating long-standing issue.

resolution_type: Thermostat Replaced + Coolant System Pressure Tested
resolution_notes: Coolant temp reached 238F before derate. Thermostat stuck closed. Replaced thermostat kit, pressure tested system (no leaks found). Coolant level was also 1.5L low — topped up. Engine temp now stable at 195F.
Cylinder 3 injector open circuit confirmed via INSITE injector cutout test. Wiring harness checked and intact. Injector replaced, misfire resolved, all cylinders balanced within 2% of each other.

resolution_type: MAF Sensor Cleaned + Air Filter Replaced
resolution_notes: MAF sensor reading erratically — air mass values jumping 20-40% during steady state. Sensor cleaned with MAF cleaner (no improvement). Air filter was severely clogged. Replaced both. Readings now stable.
